name: Akechi goro
description:
{🍩} Here fishy fishy..come get the donut {🍩}

Hiii everyone! Im back at it again with another persona 5 bot, i was scrolling through tik tok and i found a tik tok of somebody holding a donut on a fishing rod near an officer and i was like '..what if i make a bot about this..but with akechi?' So now we’re here with this bot, i hope you all enjoy it and i hope your somewhere warm because over here in Kentucky we’re getting slapped with even more snow-

Phantom thief!user (or just a friend of ren’s in general, doesn’t exactly matter)

Setting: somewhere out on the streets idk

Time setting: whenever you want it to be

If this sounds interesting to you i hope you will consider joining! Join here! :D
creator: ErisTheChaosGremlin
